_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Gregtech New Horizons 2.8.X
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH egg for versions 2.8.0+ (Java 17-25).
Comes with an update script that handles updates easily.
Just change the version and reinstall.
Make sure to back up before reinstalling!

More info:
https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Server_Setup#Server_Update

https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/downloads/

Optional daily builds:
Set GTNH_DAILY=true to download the latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java GitHub Actions artifact. Stable GTVERSION remains the default/recommended path.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Gregtech New Horizons V2.8.X Install Script
# Supports stable releases by version and optional latest daily build.

set -euo pipefail
trap 'echo "Error on line $LINENO"; exit 1' ERR

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${GTNH_DAILY:=false}"
: "${GITHUB_TOKEN:=}"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
BACKUP_DIR="$BASE_DIR/installtemp"

# Ensure server directory exists
mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

# Install dependencies
if command -v apk &>/dev/null; then
  apk --no-cache add bash curl jq unzip ca-certificates findutils
elif command -v apt &>/dev/null; then
  apt update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y curl jq unzip ca-certificates findutils
else
  echo "No supported package manager found. Need curl, jq, unzip, ca-certificates and findutils."
  exit 1
fi

# Backup JourneyMapServer if it exists
rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

if [[ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer to $BACKUP_DIR..."
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

# Delete the old files/folders.
# World files and most root-level server files are intentionally left alone.
echo "Deleting old GTNH pack files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

cd "$BASE_DIR"

github_curl() {
  if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    curl -fsSL \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  else
    curl -fsSL \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  fi
}

download_stable() {
  local gtnh_zip_file="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"
  local gtnh_url="https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks/${gtnh_zip_file}"

  echo "Daily builds disabled. Downloading stable GTNH ${GTVERSION}..."
  echo "Downloading ${gtnh_url}"

  curl -fL -o "$gtnh_zip_file" "$gtnh_url"
  unzip -n "$gtnh_zip_file"
  rm -f "$gtnh_zip_file" *.md *.bat
}

download_daily() {
  echo "Daily builds enabled. Searching latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java artifact..."

  local runs_api="https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/workflows/daily-modpack-build.yml/runs?branch=master&status=success&per_page=10"
  local runs_json
  runs_json="$(github_curl "$runs_api")"

  local artifact_json
  artifact_json="$(jq -r '.workflow_runs[].id' <<< "$runs_json" | while read -r run_id; do
    [[ -z "$run_id" ]] && continue
    github_curl "https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/runs/${run_id}/artifacts" \
      | jq -c '.artifacts[]? | select((.expired == false) and (.name | endswith("server-new-java")))'
  done | head -n1)"

  if [[ -z "$artifact_json" || "$artifact_json" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "Could not find a non-expired GTNH daily server-new-java artifact."
    echo "If GitHub rate limits or blocks anonymous artifact downloads, set GITHUB_TOKEN in the egg variables."
    exit 1
  fi

  local artifact_name
  local download_url
  artifact_name="$(jq -r '.name' <<< "$artifact_json")"
  download_url="$(jq -r '.archive_download_url' <<< "$artifact_json")"

  echo "Found artifact: ${artifact_name}"
  echo "Downloading daily artifact..."

  rm -rf "$BASE_DIR/daily-artifact"
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/daily-artifact"

  github_curl -L -o "$BASE_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" "$download_url"
  unzip -o "$BASE_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" -d "$BASE_DIR/daily-artifact"

  local daily_zip
  daily_zip="$(find "$BASE_DIR/daily-artifact" -type f \( -name '*Server_Java_17-25.zip' -o -name '*server-new-java.zip' -o -name '*.zip' \) | head -n1)"

  if [[ -z "$daily_zip" ]]; then
    echo "Daily artifact did not contain a server zip."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting daily server zip: ${daily_zip}"
  unzip -n "$daily_zip"
  rm -rf "$BASE_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" "$BASE_DIR/daily-artifact" *.md *.bat
}

case "${GTNH_DAILY,,}" in
  true)
    download_daily
    ;;
  false)
    download_stable
    ;;
  *)
    echo "GTNH_DAILY must be true or false."
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

if [[ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

# Restore backed-up files
if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer from installtemp..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found - skipping restore."
fi

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. 2.8.x and up supported

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Use Daily Builds
variables.description: Use latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java build instead of stable GTVERSION. Stable is recommended/default.

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: Optional. Needed only if daily build artifact download is rate limited or requires GitHub authentication. Leave empty for stable builds.
